promoStrips.title: More ways into the feeling.
promoStrips.lead: Discover gates, worlds and pieces that carry the soul of Calestra forward.

gate.title: The Gate of Light
gate.body: Feel the pull of the glowing threshold where Calestra begins.

keep.title: Harmonic Keep
keep.body: Follow the journey, signals and levels building the next phase.

drop.title: Carry the Star
drop.body: Products, symbols and fragments of the world to carry with you.
